zsh.c(3) Library Functions Manual zsh.c(3)

NAME

zsh.c - Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

SYNOPSIS

Functions


asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE *output)

Detailed Description

Zsh shell completion script generator with category grouping.

Definition in file zsh.c.

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t completions_generate_zsh (FILE * output)

Definition at line 240 of file zsh.c.

240                                                          {
241   if (!output) {
242     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Output stream cannot be NULL");
243   }
244 
245   fprintf(output, "#compdef _ascii_chat ascii-chat\n"
246                   "# Zsh completion script for ascii-chat\n"
247                   "# Generated from options registry - DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY\n"
248                   "\n"
249                   "_ascii_chat() {\n"
250                   "  local curcontext=\"$curcontext\"\n"
251                   "  \n"
252                   "  # Check if second word is an option (starts with -) - default to discovery\n"
253                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == -* ]]; then\n"
254                   "    curcontext=\"${curcontext%%%%:*}:discovery\"\n");
255 
256   /* Discovery mode options (includes binary-level options) */
257   size_t discovery_count = 0;
258   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &discovery_count);
259   if (discovery_opts) {
260     fprintf(output, "    _arguments -s \\\n");
261     for (size_t i = 0; i < discovery_count; i++) {
262       zsh_format_option_for_arguments(output, &discovery_opts[i], i < discovery_count - 1);
263     }
264     fprintf(output, "\n");
265     SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts);
266   }
267 
268   fprintf(output, "    return 0\n"
269                   "  fi\n"
270                   "\n"
271                   "  # Server mode\n"
272                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == \"server\" ]]; then\n"
273                   "    curcontext=\"${curcontext%%%%:*}:server\"\n"
274                   "    _arguments -s \\\n");
275 
276   /* Server options */
277   size_t server_count = 0;
278   const option_descriptor_t *server_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_SERVER, false, &server_count);
279   if (server_opts) {
280     for (size_t i = 0; i < server_count; i++) {
281       zsh_format_option_for_arguments(output, &server_opts[i], i < server_count - 1);
282     }
283     fprintf(output, "\n");
284     SAFE_FREE(server_opts);
285   }
286 
287   fprintf(output, "    return 0\n"
288                   "  fi\n"
289                   "\n"
290                   "  # Discovery service mode\n"
291                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == \"discovery-service\" ]]; then\n"
292                   "    curcontext=\"${curcontext%%%%:*}:discovery-service\"\n"
293                   "    _arguments -s \\\n");
294 
295   /* Discovery-service options */
296   size_t discovery_svc_count = 0;
297   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_svc_opts =
298       options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY_SERVICE, false, &discovery_svc_count);
299   if (discovery_svc_opts) {
300     for (size_t i = 0; i < discovery_svc_count; i++) {
301       zsh_format_option_for_arguments(output, &discovery_svc_opts[i], i < discovery_svc_count - 1);
302     }
303     fprintf(output, "\n");
304     SAFE_FREE(discovery_svc_opts);
305   }
306 
307   fprintf(output, "    return 0\n"
308                   "  fi\n"
309                   "\n"
310                   "  # Client mode\n"
311                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == \"client\" ]]; then\n"
312                   "    curcontext=\"${curcontext%%%%:*}:client\"\n"
313                   "    _arguments -s \\\n");
314 
315   /* Client options */
316   size_t client_count = 0;
317   const option_descriptor_t *client_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_CLIENT, false, &client_count);
318   if (client_opts) {
319     for (size_t i = 0; i < client_count; i++) {
320       zsh_format_option_for_arguments(output, &client_opts[i], i < client_count - 1);
321     }
322     fprintf(output, "\n");
323     SAFE_FREE(client_opts);
324   }
325 
326   fprintf(output, "    return 0\n"
327                   "  fi\n"
328                   "\n"
329                   "  # Mirror mode\n"
330                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == \"mirror\" ]]; then\n"
331                   "    curcontext=\"${curcontext%%%%:*}:mirror\"\n"
332                   "    _arguments -s \\\n");
333 
334   /* Mirror options */
335   size_t mirror_count = 0;
336   const option_descriptor_t *mirror_opts = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_MIRROR, false, &mirror_count);
337   if (mirror_opts) {
338     for (size_t i = 0; i < mirror_count; i++) {
339       zsh_format_option_for_arguments(output, &mirror_opts[i], i < mirror_count - 1);
340     }
341     fprintf(output, "\n");
342     SAFE_FREE(mirror_opts);
343   }
344 
345   fprintf(output, "    return 0\n"
346                   "  fi\n"
347                   "\n"
348                   "  # Explicit discovery mode\n"
349                   "  if [[ \"${words[2]}\" == \"discovery\" ]]; then\n"
350                   "    curcontext=\"${curcontext%%%%:*}:discovery\"\n"
351                   "    _arguments -s \\\n");
352 
353   /* Discovery mode options for explicit discovery command */
354   size_t discovery_count2 = 0;
355   const option_descriptor_t *discovery_opts2 = options_registry_get_for_display(MODE_DISCOVERY, true, &discovery_count2);
356   if (discovery_opts2) {
357     for (size_t i = 0; i < discovery_count2; i++) {
358       zsh_format_option_for_arguments(output, &discovery_opts2[i], i < discovery_count2 - 1);
359     }
360     fprintf(output, "\n");
361     SAFE_FREE(discovery_opts2);
362   }
363 
364   fprintf(output, "    return 0\n"
365                   "  fi\n"
366                   "\n"
367                   "  # No mode specified - show mode selection\n"
368                   "  local state line modes\n"
369                   "  _arguments -s \\\n"
370                   "    '1: :->mode' && return\n"
371                   "  [[ -n \"$state\" ]] || return 1\n"
372                   "  case $state in\n"
373                   "    mode)\n"
374                   "      local -a server_modes client_modes\n"
375                   "      server_modes=(\n");
376 
377   /* Generate server-like modes from registry */
378   size_t mode_server_count = 0;
379   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_server_descs = get_modes_by_group("server-like", &mode_server_count);
380   if (mode_server_descs) {
381     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_server_count; i++) {
382       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_server_descs[i].name, mode_server_descs[i].description);
383     }
384     SAFE_FREE(mode_server_descs);
385   }
386 
387   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
388                   "      client_modes=(\n");
389 
390   /* Generate client-like modes from registry */
391   size_t mode_client_count = 0;
392   const mode_descriptor_t *mode_client_descs = get_modes_by_group("client-like", &mode_client_count);
393   if (mode_client_descs) {
394     for (size_t i = 0; i < mode_client_count; i++) {
395       if (strcmp(mode_client_descs[i].name, "discovery") == 0) {
396         continue;
397       }
398       fprintf(output, "        '%s:%s'\n", mode_client_descs[i].name, mode_client_descs[i].description);
399     }
400     SAFE_FREE(mode_client_descs);
401   }
402 
403   fprintf(output, "      )\n"
404                   "      _describe -t server-modes 'server-like modes' server_modes\n"
405                   "      _describe -t client-modes 'client-like modes' client_modes\n"
406                   "      ;;\n"
407                   "  esac\n"
408                   "}\n");
409 
410   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
411 }




References get_modes_by_group(),
    options_registry_get_for_display(), SAFE_FREE, and
    SET_ERRNO.


Referenced by completions_generate_for_shell().








Author

    Version 0.9.0
    ascii-chat
